title: coursetia hassleri
intro: Coursetia hassleri is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the "thorny pea tree" due to its thorny branches and pea-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Coursetia hassleri include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Coursetia hassleri typically involve drying the leaves and stems to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
